basic_details.job_title: OFH VFJ MBBS Doctors Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur
basic_details.short_information: Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur (OFH VFJ) MBBS Doctors Notification 2026 has been released on 05 April 2026 on the official website of OFH VFJ. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the OFH VFJ MBBS Doctors Recruitment 2026. Candidates having MBBS or Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI/NMC and registration with Central/State Medical Council are eligible to attend the walk-in interview for these MBBS Doctors vacancies. The walk-in interview for OFH VFJ MBBS Doctors Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 13 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notificatio

qualification.details: MBBS or Equivalent Degree recognized by MCI/NMC. Candidate should be registered with Central/State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Montlily Remuneration: Rs. 75000/- Per Month Daily rate of reduction from the remuneration for absence: Rs. 2500/- per day

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MBBS Doctors at OFH VFJ?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the MBBS Doctors position at Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur is scheduled for 13th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the MBBS Doctors post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the MBBS Doctors post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the MBBS Doctors role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the MBBS Doctors position, candidates must possess an MBBS or an equivalent degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI) or the National Medical Commission (NMC). Additionally, they must be registered with a Central or State Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for MBBS Doctors?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Hospital Vehicle Factory Jabalpur has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the post of MBBS Doctors through this walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to appear directly at the specified venue on the interview date.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including their MBBS degree certificate, medical registration certificate, ID proof, and any other relevant certificates. Self-attested photocopies of these documents and recent passport-size photographs are also required.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Ordnance Factory Hospital, Vehicle Factory Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 482009.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job. The selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the specified period.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits, nor does it mention any provisions for age relaxation for this particular recruitment drive.
